home.feature_principals_desc: Read the guiding message from the head of our institution.
home.feature_staff_desc: Meet our highly qualified and dedicated faculty members.
home.feature_result_desc: Students and parents can check latest exam results online.
home.core_library_desc: Rich collection of academic and fictional literature.
home.core_transport_desc: Safe and secure AC transport covering the entire city.
home.core_sports_desc: Vast playground with indoor and outdoor sports facilities.
home.about_title: We Offer the Best Education With Great Care.
home.about_desc: Our institution believes in nurturing potential and guiding every individual toward success. With world-class facilities and a dedicated teaching staff, we ensure a holistic environment.
home.faq_subtitle: Find answers to common queries about our institution.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Discover the history, mission, and the dedicated people behind Dhaka Ideal Academy.
about.mission_text: To provide a dynamic educational environment that fosters intellectual curiosity, critical thinking, and moral integrity. We aim to equip our students with the skills necessary to navigate a rapidly changing world while maintaining deep respect for cultural values.
about.vision_text: To be recognized globally as a center of educational excellence that nurtures future leaders, innovators, and compassionate human beings who will contribute positively to society and the world at large.

admissions.title: Admission Information
admissions.subtitle: Join Dhaka Ideal Academy for the upcoming 2026-2027 academic session. Discover our simple enrollment process.
admissions.step1_desc: Fill out the online admission form available on our portal.
admissions.step2_desc: Appear for a basic evaluation test based on previous class syllabus.
admissions.step3_desc: A brief interaction session with the student and parents.
admissions.step4_desc: Submit required documents and pay admission fees to secure the seat.
admissions.doc5: 3 copies of recent passport size photographs

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Reach out to us for any queries regarding admissions, academics, or general information.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.subtitle: Be a part of our vibrant campus life. Check out the upcoming events and mark your calendars.

notice.title: Notice Board
notice.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest announcements, academic schedules, and events from Dhaka Ideal Academy.

teachers.title: Teachers Corner
teachers.subtitle: Meet our highly qualified and dedicated faculty members who shape the future of our students.

blogs.title: School Blog
blogs.subtitle: Insights, tips, and stories from our teachers, students, and educational experts.

footer.about_text: Empowering students to reach their full potential through modern education, deep care, and moral values.
